brief: Global attention is on the World Cup final as Trump attends, while geopolitical tensions persist with Iran and Russia. UK prepares for a new PM, and a ferry sinking in Guyana adds to the day's tragedies.
news_summary: Trump arrives by helicopter for the World Cup final amid escalating US-Iran conflict; Russia launches major missile attacks on Ukraine; Peru earthquake kills six; a ferry sinks off Guyana with dozens missing.
papers_summary: Papers explore writing process dynamics, AI's effect on rhetorical moves, and human-robot interaction in juggling, alongside analyses of traffic data and visualization literacy.

en.brief: Global attention is on the World Cup final as Trump attends, while geopolitical tensions persist with Iran and Russia. UK prepares for a new PM, and a ferry sinking in Guyana adds to the day's tragedies.
en.news_summary: Trump arrives by helicopter for the World Cup final amid escalating US-Iran conflict; Russia launches major missile attacks on Ukraine; Peru earthquake kills six; a ferry sinks off Guyana with dozens missing.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore writing process dynamics, AI's effect on rhetorical moves, and human-robot interaction in juggling, alongside analyses of traffic data and visualization literacy.

zh.brief: 今日焦點包括雙生姐妹遺傳研究為癌症預防提供關鍵線索，中國揭陽虐狗案引發全球聲援與立法呼籲，北韓民眾透過K-pop接觸外部文化。歐洲熱浪推高中國空調需求，世界盃金靴之爭進入白熱化，以及首次發現宜居帶系外行星大氣層。
zh.news_summary: 雙生姐妹身高不足1.2米卻提供癌症預防線索；中國虐狗案引發全球抵制行動與動保立法討論；北韓脫北者揭露K-pop滲透情況；歐洲熱浪下中國空調品牌崛起；姆巴佩與梅西角逐世界盃金靴。
zh.papers_summary: 中文論文今日無更新；英文研究聚焦寫作過程與AI工具影響，如ChatGPT修改對個人陳述的影響、多模態大語言模型圖表理解能力。

todays_image.caption: Both the first helicopter mail sack and Trump's arrival signal a moment when a helicopter carries something of significance—be it letters or a leader—to a historic event.
todays_image.title: First helicopter mail sack
